title: hieracium piloselloides subsp. pseudoflorentinum
intro: Hieracium piloselloides subsp. pseudoflorentinum, commonly known as false hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium piloselloides subsp. pseudoflorentinum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
